releaseNotes: Urgent fix: multichannel (5.1/7.1) movies/shows still crashed after v1.14.34's stereo downmix - it turned out Media3's own ChannelMixingAudioProcessor class was the actual broken component on this hardware, not multichannel audio itself. Replaced it with our own minimal, hand-rolled downmix that bypasses that specific Media3 class entirely - the same approach TiviMate's own code takes (verified: zero use of ChannelMixingAudioProcessor anywhere in its APK). New: a video decoder that corrupts or freezes on real playback is now detected automatically from excessive dropped frames and permanently avoided on that device from then on. Performance: poster/backdrop images now decode at half the memory and CPU cost, cutting janky scrolling on low-RAM devices. Fix: a Dolby Vision decoder variant (DVAV) wasn't being filtered out like its DVHE counterpart. Tweak: buffer depth increased slightly on the Smooth profile.
